SELECT hbl_account.hbl_accountid, hbl_account.hbl_account_name, hbl_account.hbl_account_physical_address, hbl_account.hbl_account_website, hbl_account.hbl_account_special_domain, hbl_account.hbl_account_development_ratio, hbl_account.hbl_account_annual_it_budget, hbl_account.hbl_account_year_found, hbl_account.cr987_account_am_salesid, hbl_account.cr987_account_bdid, hbl_account.createdon, hbl_account.modifiedon 
FROM hbl_account 
WHERE lower(CAST(hbl_account.hbl_account_name AS VARCHAR)) = :lower_1

SELECT hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunitiesid, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_name, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_accountid, hbl_opportunities.mc_opportunities_ownerid, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_bant_authority, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_bant_need, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_bant_time, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_estimated_value, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_start_time_est, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_end_time_est, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_deadline, hbl_opportunities.mc_opportunities_presales, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunitiest_next_time_action, hbl_opportunities.hbl_opportunities_interactions, hbl_opportunities.createdon, hbl_opportunities.modifiedon 
FROM hbl_opportunities
